mapper.select: SELECT server_id AS serverId, boss_id AS bossId, status, unit_soldiers AS unitSoldiers, last_killer AS lastKiller, window_start_ms AS windowStartMs FROM world_boss_state WHERE server_id = #{serverId} AND boss_id = #{bossId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO world_boss_state (server_id, boss_id, status, unit_soldiers, last_killer, window_start_ms) VALUES (#{serverId}, #{bossId}, #{status}, #{unitSoldiers}, #{lastKiller}, #{windowStartMs}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = #{status}, unit_soldiers = #{unitSoldiers}, last_killer = #{lastKiller}, window_start_ms = #{windowStartMs}

INSERT INTO world_boss_damage (server_id, boss_id, user_id, window_start_ms, total_damage, attack_count, cooldown_until) VALUES (#{serverId}, #{bossId}, #{userId}, #{windowStartMs}, #{damage}, 1, #{cooldownUntil}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_damage = total_damage + #{damage}, attack_count = attack_count + 1, cooldown_until = #{cooldownUntil}
mapper.select: SELECT boss_id AS bossId, window_start_ms AS windowStartMs FROM world_boss_damage WHERE server_id = #{serverId} ORDER BY window_start_ms DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT report_json FROM world_boss_last_report WHERE server_id = #{serverId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO world_boss_last_report (server_id, report_json, updated_at) VALUES (#{serverId}, #{reportJson}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE report_json = #{reportJson}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}
